name: orangutany
description: Orangutany production web app with backend identification proxy and design tokens

scripts.dev: concurrently "PORT=3001 APP_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 node server.js" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check src/auth.js && node --check src/db.js && node --check src/google-oauth.js && node --check public/scripts/app.js && node --check public/scripts/auth.js && node --check public/scripts/common-auth.js && node scripts/validate-tokens.js
